CustomField.description: External LMS user identifier. The Google Classroom user ID (numeric) or Google account email. Dedup key for enrollment sync - without this the GC adapter cannot match a Classroom student to a Salesforce Contact. Index this field.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: External LMS user identifier. The Google Classroom user ID (numeric) or Google account email. Dedup key for enrollment sync - without this the GC adapter cannot match a Classroom student to a Salesforce
CustomField.label: LMS Learner ID
